title: Sleek delete confirmation for file explorer
description:
Deleting files or folders in PipeShare no longer uses the plain browser popup. You now get a clean in-app confirmation that shows what will be removed, warns that cloud delete is permanent, and matches the rest of the PipeShare UI.

Who is affected: PipeShare file explorer on BASE (and SaaS after Push).
changeLog: Replace browser delete confirm with a professional in-app modal.
Show selected file/folder names before permanent cloud delete.
Clear Cancel / Delete actions with keyboard Escape and Enter support.
